family_catalog.purpose: Download (offline-cached for v0.1), atmospheric-correct and co-register Sentinel-2 / Landsat-8 tiles covering the AOI for downstream spectral and change-detection analysis.

family_catalog.human_label: Spectral anomaly scoring on AOI tiles
family_catalog.purpose: Run pinned ASTER / Sentinel-2 spectral indices (clay, iron oxide, kaolinite, sericite) over the AOI tiles and rank pixels by anomaly intensity vs. regional background.
From SRTM 30m DEM compute slope, aspect, curvature, ruggedness index and structural lineaments. Light heavy: raster derivatives, no DEM inversion.
Co-register global gravity (WGM2012) and magnetic (EMAG2) anomaly grids with the AOI bbox, derive a local depth-sensitive signature, and produce a fused signal map.
Aggregate the per-layer confidence into an AOI uncertainty map. Surfaces which AOIs are 'high score but high uncertainty' vs. 'high score and tight uncertainty'.
Re-run the spectral / DEM descriptors on a second worker and compare; flag AOIs where descriptor outputs diverge more than the consensus threshold.
